conflicts.detailed_explanation: Major contradiction detected in active legal eligibility clauses. The maximum refund period varies by 15 days between regional corporate draft and global standard compliance guidelines.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: Customers are eligible for a full refund within 30 business days of original purchase date. Requires certified physical receipt of sale.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: EMEA Enterprise customers may request refunds up to 45 calendar days. Exceptions apply for custom order digital media assets.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Metadata structure mismatch found during ETL extraction. Incoming relational table columns do not match structure stored in global database graph schema definitions.
Strong semantic redundancy detected between legacy help articles and incoming system document chunks. This redundancy could degrade search ranking outcomes.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: To reset your system account passwords, visit the centralized auth screen and click forgot credentials to receive back an email verification index.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: If an operator forgets their primary login credentials, password recovery is initiated by triggering a custom token loop from the authentication workspace reset tab.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Conflicting user session timeout definitions. Stored value dictates 30 minutes, whereas newly ingested security checklist suggests 15 minutes max for active ISO compliance settings.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: Standard authentication session expiration configuration is strictly hardcoded to 30 minutes.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: To ensure defense-in-depth security, session expiration timeouts must drop to 15 minutes maximum.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Out of date postal code database routing parameters detected. Incoming zip updates cover newly generated delivery districts.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: Postal zoning code lists show 94103 covering active SOMA delivery centers.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: Postal code 94103 has partitioned into 94103-Alpha and 94103-Beta zones.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: 德國地區例外條款 Conflict. Standard European Union VAT rules are coexisting alongside German Digitized Exception codes requiring unified consolidation.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: Standard European VAT of 15% is automatically calculated and appended at checkout points for online downloads.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: German VAT exception rules of 19% must apply strictly for digitized layouts and web templates sold directly to physical residents.
conflicts.resolution_instruction: Combine European rules as baseline but append German 19% digitization exception rules into the main VAT logic tree.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Emailed support desk route change detected. The incoming file provides localized support contact parameters that supersedes old company routing directories.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: Support queries can be addressed directly to our operations team via contact@aeroflow.ai.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: Central support endpoints have transitioned to support@globalcorp-aeroflow.com. Standard response time is 2 hours.
conflicts.resolution_instruction: No manual action. Automatic substitution with newer support e-mail endpoint.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Graph node attributes mismatch. Schema requirements for registered platform model nodes restrict undefined keys unless validated.
conflicts.resolution_instruction: Instruct LLM validator to reject incoming schema due to vital core attribute deletions.

conflicts.detailed_explanation: Mutual exclusivity on NDA jurisdiction constraints. California versus Delaware litigation forums cannot both act as the designated legal venue.
conflicts.existing_snapshot: This agreement shall be governed, construed, and enforced strictly in accordance with the laws of the State of California.
conflicts.incoming_snapshot: Venue and legal jurisdiction of any operational disputes shall lie exclusively in the courts of the State of Delaware.
conflicts.resolution_instruction: Enforce standard enterprise legal protocol to prefer legal jurisdiction within California.
